title: Star Wars (2015) 73
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 73}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 73}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-73.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 73 |writer=[[Greg Pak]] |penciller=[[Phil Noto]] |inker=Phil Noto |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=Phil Noto |cover artist=Phil Noto |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[October 23]], [[2019]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/81230/star_wars_2015_73|text=Star Wars (2015) #73}} |pages=23 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=c. [[2 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 73 to around [[2 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=73 }} '''''Star Wars'' 73''' is the seventy-third issue of the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Greg Pak]], illustrated by [[Phil Noto]], and published on [[October 23]], [[2019]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. The issue features the story "'''Rebels and Rogues Part VI'''," which is set before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''MOMENTS OF TRUTH! Who is DAR CHAMPION and how far can LEIA trust him when HAN'S life is on the line on BOSS CARPO'S golden starship? What shocking lesson will LUKE learn when WARBA finally reveals her true self? And when faced with his lost past, can THREEPIO seize control of his destiny -- and be the hero of his own story? The lives of thousands of rebels hang in the balance as our heroes grapple with their greatest doubts and challenges!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=REBELS AND ROGUES
Part VI |text=The Rebel Alliance's greatest heroes have embarked on three daring missions to thwart the evil Galactic Empire. On K43, C-3PO and Chewbacca have encountered unexpected sentient life—and Darth Vader—thwarting their plan of destabilizing the planet's core to sabotage Imperial warships. On Sergia, Luke's efforts to hide a secret Rebel camp have been complicated after the thief Warba Calip stole his lightsaber. And on Lanz Carpo, Leia and Han's mission to trick the Empire and the crime lord Boss Carpo into fighting each other was complicated by the interference of Leia's ex, Dar Champion. Dar's now on their side, but Han's been captured by Carpo's thugs....}} ==Plot summary== ===An offer of alliance=== On [[Lanz Carpo]], [[Han Solo]] is brought before Boss Carpo, who is frustrated by Han's "14 conflicting stories." Boss Carpo contacts [[Dar Champion]] and threatens to kill Han, stating that he is outside of Dar's jurisdiction. In a bold move, [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia]] grabs the comms device and reveals their mission: they were trying to frame Carpo by sending fake transmissions to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebellion]], intending for the Empire to intercept them. Rather than being angry, Boss Carpo tells Leia that his own people have intercepted transmissions from the regional Imperial Governor, who is planning a covert military operation to eliminate him. He offers to spare Han's life in exchange for one "small favor": destroy the Imperial Governor before he can destroy Boss Carpo. Dar calls it a suicide mission, but Leia accepts, devising a plan to forge a manifest and board the Governor's vessel as traders. Han calls [[Chewbacca]] to get an update on his mission, not knowing he's in a battle with [[stormtrooper]]s on [[Mission to K43|K43]]. ===A desperate battle=== On the volcanic planet of K43, [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] uses [[the Force]] to manipulate the sentient rock creatures, who are now under his control. He orders them to attack one of his officers. Suddenly, Chewbacca appears and flees with [[C-3PO]], having only managed to deactivate about half of the detonators they planted. [[Luke Skywalker|Luke]] receives a call from C-3PO on [[Sergia]], who explains the situation: the planet is inhabited by sentient rock creatures who will be wiped out if the detonators go off. He says that Han is on his way to help, but that he is bringing more Imperials with him. C-3PO explains they have a chance to kill Vader with the detonators. Suddenly, Vader senses Luke's presence and orders his troops not to kill the [[droid]] and [[Wookiee]]. Back on Sergia, Luke catches up to [[Warba Calip|Warba]], demanding his lightsaber back. She tells him he should have taken better care of it. Luke commandeers a stormtrooper's speeder bike and, using it as a distraction, destroys an Imperial shuttle before escaping with stormtroopers on his tail. Warba, reluctantly returns his lightsaber. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 73}} ===Editions=== *UPC 759606081134; [[October 23]], [[2019]]; [[Marvel Comics]] **07311; Cover A; [[Phil Noto]] **07321; Cover B; [[John Tyler Christopher]] **07331; Cover C; [[Rod Reis]] **07341; Cover D; John Tyler Christopher ===Cover gallery=== File:StarWars2015-73.jpg|Cover A
